message:
perf(parser): preallocate comma-separated parse lists

Preallocate the shared comma-separated parser vector with capacity 4 before pushing the first element. This keeps parser behavior unchanged while avoiding the 1->2->4 allocation cascade on common SELECT lists, VALUES rows, CTE column lists, indexed columns, and similar hot paths.

Bench: parser scratch microbench, 200000 iterations, hyperfine --warmup 3 --runs 12. Before 470.6 ms +/- 7.8 ms; after 435.8 ms +/- 3.7 ms; 1.08 +/- 0.02 times faster.

Verification: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_rose_parser_check cargo check -p fsqlite-parser; cargo test -p fsqlite-parser; cargo fmt --check --package fsqlite-parser; cargo clippy -p fsqlite-parser --all-targets -- -D warnings. Bead: bd-1dp9.6.2.
